description: NewTurn-class regression-guard. NextAuth (v5+) catchall route at app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts is a pure re-export of GET/POST handlers from the auth module — the route IS the auth handler, nothing to 'guard'. After F-AUTH-2, scanner recognizes pure auth-module re-exports + path-pattern. auth-enforcer MUST NOT fire CWE-306.
